tone.data_density: Medium-high — contextualise data with policy implications
tone.framing: Strategic planning, student experience, institutional risk

tone.data_density: Medium — headline stats with clear takeaway
tone.framing: Market opportunity, competitive intelligence, advising advantage

amber_company.label: amber company page
amber_company.perspective: Company as market expert and partner

madhur.label: Madhur — data-led thought leadership
madhur.tone: Data-analytics market intelligence, structured analysis, mixes personal POV ('I') with institutional framing ('Amber's view/take')
madhur.perspective: Founder analysing market data — leads with stats, adds nuanced interpretation, gives actionable pricing/strategy recommendations
madhur.format: Bold headline with key stat → structured sections with subheadings → data bullets with YoY comparisons and trend arrows (▼ ▲) → 'Amber's view/take →' recommendation → colleague tags → 5-8 hashtags
madhur.formatting_notes: Uses Unicode bold for emphasis, bullet points (•), trend arrows (▼ ▲ →), italic for Amber's take sections
madhur.avoid: Generic corporate speak, vague claims without data, opinion without evidence, alarm/negativity without nuance

jools.label: Jools — thought leadership
jools.tone: Personal POV, university partnership angle, HE sector voice
jools.perspective: Senior leader bridging HE and accommodation sectors
